testcase.name: test_admin_submission_has_image_and_comment

failure.message: AssertionError: Preview image not accessible: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_watermark_submit.py:130: in test_admin_submission_has_image_and_comment assert pr.status_code == 200, f"Preview image not accessible: {pr.status_code}" E AssertionError: Preview image not accessible: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
